candidate_definition_hints.text: We release various convolutional neural networks (CNNs) trained on Places365 to the public. Places365 is the latest subset of [Places2 Database](http://places2.csail.mit.edu). There are two versions of Places365: **Places365-Standard** and **Places365-Challenge**. The train set …
